name: New Murchison Gold Limited
analysis: NMG has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 40% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.0460, stop A$0.0347, target A$0.0510 (0.44:1) — then trail it.
